calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-26-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:35am
Cause called for Small Claims appeal, Judge Pro Tem Roger Rubin, nothing on record. Clerk-Beth Wilber, Dept. 525.
Appellant, Spark Construction appears in Pro Per through Simon Spark. No appearance by Respondent, Allwood Door Company. Mr. Spark, previously sworn, presents his case in the narrative and responds to questions from Judge Rubin.
9:45am
Matter is submitted. No new evidence is marked or retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-29-2009 Judgment Entered
